creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
the newly comitted makes patch barf; maybe because there's no difference?

here's the part of the patch that fails. A you see, there's no difference.
Index: template/apsfilterrc
===================================================================

retrieving revision 1.6
retrieving revision 1.7
diff -u -u -r1.6 -r1.7
--- apsfilterrc 1999/05/26 16:30:57     1.6
+++ apsfilterrc 1999/07/18 22:39:46     1.7
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 ##############################################################################
 #
-# $Id: patch-aa,v 1.9 1999/07/18 23:03:10 andreas Exp $
+# $Id: patch-aa,v 1.9 1999/07/18 23:03:10 andreas Exp $
 #
 # Sample apsfilter template file
 # This file is for customizing apsfilter's behaviour

Fix: 

remove the part above from the patch-aa file?
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/print/apsfilter
make
